message:
Switch fsqlite dependencies from local paths to crates.io registry 0.1.0

Replace local path references to frankensqlite crates with registry versions:
- fsqlite, fsqlite-core, fsqlite-types, fsqlite-error all set to "0.1.0"

Cargo.lock updated to deduplicate asupersync (remove local duplicate, keep
registry 0.2.5) and add source+checksum entries for all fsqlite-* crates
now resolved from crates.io instead of local paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
